items: **Update checker**: Lets you know when there is a new release of Avia Client.
**Custom badges**: Expanded list of available badges.
**What's new**: A recreation of Stoat's What's New to display what's new in Avia Client.. Wait A Second. Isn't that how you are viewing this?
**Avia Menu**: A new menu has been added within the chat header.
**New API**: Plugin Devs can register their own buttons using the API, which will appear inside the new menu.
Screensharing support is now supported along with a Integrated screen picker

content.text:
Here is how the API works

`window.AviaMenu.register({ id: "UniqueID", name: "Example Name", icon: "Any Material 3 Icon here", onClick: AnyFuntionHere });`
The ID has to be Unique. It will fail to register if there is another plugin already using that ID

items: Avia Client Now uses its own storage. Meaning its a completely **fresh install** of Avia Client.
Both Online and Local Plugins have both been given a UI revamp.
Both Online and Local Plugins have had their plugin order reversed - the most recent plugins added now shows on top instead of bottom.
Added `@import url("")` support to Themes (not QuickCSS). This allows you to load themes via a URL, allowing themes that either both local and parts of it online - or purely online.
Font Loader has had a complete UI revamp, including support for Local fonts.
The Trusted Repo now has the ability to Install Plugins to Local Plugins.
Monaco has been updated to v0.50.
**MacOS**: Aurora icon now supports Liquid Glass.
Every Panel now Fetches its contents on open. This fixes a bug where newly added buttons could not show till you restart the client.
Removed our custom frame plugin now that MacOS support is built-in.

content.text: Your settings and data will not transfer automatically. Backup your settings. You will need to sign back in.
